9.3 Feature Description 9.3.1 Hot Plug-In and In-Rush Current Control The devices are designed to control the in-rush current upon insertion of a card into a live backplane or  other hot power source.

OVP, dVdT, IMON, MODE, SHDN, ILIM

electrical_characteristics.conditions: TPS16632 only, V(IN) > 40 V, I(OUT) = 1 mA

IN to OUT total ON resistance
SHDN threshold voltage for low IQ shutdown, falling

pin_definitions.description: Power input. Connects to the DRAIN of the internal FET.
Supply voltage of the device. Always connect P_IN to IN directly.
Input for setting the programmable undervoltage lockout threshold.
Input for setting the adjustable overvoltage protection threshold (TPS16630 only).
Input for setting the adjustable output power limiting threshold (TPS16632 only).
A capacitor from this pin to GND sets output voltage slew rate.
A resistor from this pin to GND sets the overload limit.
Mode selection pin for Overload fault response.
Shutdown pin. Pulling SHDN low makes the device enter into low power shutdown mode.
Analog current monitor output. Sources a scaled down ratio of current through the internal FET.
Fault event indicator. Open drain output.
Active High. Indicates that the internal FET is enhanced.

logical_pins.name: IN
logical_pins.description: Power input. Connects to the DRAIN of the internal FET.

logical_pins.name: P_IN
logical_pins.description: Supply voltage of the device. Always connect P_IN to IN directly.

logical_pins.name: UVLO
logical_pins.description: Input for setting the programmable undervoltage lockout threshold.

logical_pins.name: OVP
logical_pins.description: Input for setting the adjustable overvoltage protection threshold (TPS16630 only).

logical_pins.name: PLIM
logical_pins.description: Input for setting the adjustable output power limiting threshold (TPS16632 only).

logical_pins.name: dVdT
logical_pins.description: A capacitor from this pin to GND sets output voltage slew rate. Leaving this pin floating enables device power up in thermal regulation.

logical_pins.name: ILIM
logical_pins.description: A resistor from this pin to GND sets the overload limit.

logical_pins.name: MODE
logical_pins.description: Mode selection pin for Overload fault response.

logical_pins.name: SHDN
logical_pins.description: Shutdown pin. Pulling SHDN low makes the device to enter into low power shutdown mode.

logical_pins.name: IMON
logical_pins.description: Analog current monitor output. Sources a scaled down ratio of current through the internal FET.

logical_pins.name: FLT
logical_pins.description: Fault event indicator. This pin is an open drain output.

logical_pins.name: PGOOD
logical_pins.description: Active High. A high indicates that the internal FET is enhanced.

logical_pins.name: PowerPAD
logical_pins.description: Connect PowerPAD to GND plane for heat sinking. Do not use PowerPAD as the only electrical connection to GND.
